options.name: -CaseSensitive
options.description: Indicates that comparisons should be case-sensitive.

options.name: -Culture
options.description: Specifies the culture to use for comparisons.

options.name: -DifferenceObject
options.description: Specifies the objects that are compared to the reference objects.

options.name: -ExcludeDifferent
options.description: Indicates that this cmdlet displays only the characteristics of compared objects that are equal. The differences between the objects are discarded.

options.name: -IncludeEqual
options.description: IncludeEqual displays the matches between the reference and difference objects.

options.name: -PassThru
options.description: When you use the PassThru parameter, `Compare-Object` omits the PSCustomObject wrapper around the compared objects and returns the differing objects, unchanged.

options.name: -Property
options.description: Specifies an array of properties of the reference and difference objects to compare.

options.name: -ReferenceObject
options.description: Specifies an array of objects used as a reference for comparison.

options.name: -SyncWindow
options.description: Specifies the number of adjacent objects that `Compare-Object` inspects while looking for a match in a collection of objects. `Compare-Object` examines adjacent objects when it doesn't find the object in the same position in a collection. The default value is `[Int32]::MaxValue`, which means that `Compare-Object` examines the entire object collection.
